# Prompt Template: MVP Brainstorm & Planning

Use after you have PRD + architecture + brand docs. Paste into your coding tool with all three attached.

**Key rule:** Anchor to "a few days" or "under a week" — too vague gets a 6-month roadmap, too specific boxes the AI in.

---

```
Check out the @prd.md and @architecture.md and @brand.md along with [any screenshots] — let's brainstorm a plan around the simple lovable complete MVP that gets the first "ah ha" moment from the customer. What can we ship in a few days / under a week?
```

After the brainstorm conversation, use your planning tool (obra/superpowers or equivalent) to generate implementation plans in `docs/plans/`.

## After Plans Are Generated
- READ THE PLANS — make sure they align with your vision
- Run a feature impact analysis before building
- Create a CLAUDE.md via /init, then hand-edit it down
- You're ready for the build phase
